title: St. Paul's Church, Mangalore
tagline: St. Paul's Church, Mangalore — spiritual town of Karnataka

overview.short: St. Paul's Church, Mangalore is a much-loved spiritual town in Karnataka, known for temples and pilgrimage.
overview.description: St. Paul's Church is an Anglican church in Mangalore, India. St. Paul's Church is located at the south-west corner of the Nehru Maidan (formerly the Central Maidan) in Mangalore.

topPlaces.name: Sri Mahalingeshwara Temple, Kavoor
topPlaces.description: Sri Mahalingeshwara Temple, Kavoor is in the Kavoor area of Mangalore, Karnataka, India. It is dedicated to Mahalingeshwara, a form of Lord Shiva.

topPlaces.name: Kavoor, Mangalore
topPlaces.description: Kavoor is a suburban area and the name of a ward in the city of Mangalore in the Mysore division of the Indian state of Karnataka. Kannada and Tulu are the two most commonly spoken languages in Kavoor.

topPlaces.name: Bondel
topPlaces.description: Bondel is a residential locality in the city of Mangalore in Karnataka, India. It is one of the upscale residential localities of Mangalore.

topPlaces.name: Kadri Park
topPlaces.description: Kadri Park is a park located in Kadri Gudde (meaning "hill" in Tulu). It is the largest park in Mangaluru.

topPlaces.name: Mudushedde
topPlaces.description: Mudushedde is a village within Mangalore city in Dakshina Kannada district in the Indian state of Karnataka.

topPlaces.name: Kadri Manjunath Temple
topPlaces.description: Kadri Manjunatha Temple is a historic temple in Mangaluru in the state of Karnataka, India. The incharge and priests in the temple are Shivalli Madhva Brahmins.

topPlaces.name: Srimanthi Bhai Memorial Government Museum
topPlaces.description: Srimanthi Bhai Memorial Government Museum Mangalore, Karnataka, Collection of archaeological and geological artefacts, a unit of Directorate of Archaeology & Museums Karnataka was founded on 4 May 1960 by Sri B.D Jatti, the chief minister of Karnataka Government. The museum is located in Mangalore, the coastal land of Karnataka.

topPlaces.name: Kadri, Mangaluru
topPlaces.description: Kadri is a city in Karnataka, India. As of 2020 the Bhandary Vertica, a 56-storey building that would be one of the tallest buildings in South India, was under construction there.

itinerary.title: Day 1 — Sri Mahalingeshwara Temple, Kavoor & around

items.note: Sri Mahalingeshwara Temple, Kavoor is in the Kavoor area of Mangalore, Karnataka, India. It is dedicated to Mahalingeshwara, a form of Lord Shiva.

Kavoor is a suburban area and the name of a ward in the city of Mangalore in the Mysore division of the Indian state of Karnataka. Kannada and Tulu are the two most commonly spoken languages in Kavoor.
Bondel is a residential locality in the city of Mangalore in Karnataka, India. It is one of the upscale residential localities of Mangalore.
Kadri Park is a park located in Kadri Gudde (meaning "hill" in Tulu). It is the largest park in Mangaluru.
Mudushedde is a village within Mangalore city in Dakshina Kannada district in the Indian state of Karnataka.
Kadri Manjunatha Temple is a historic temple in Mangaluru in the state of Karnataka, India. The incharge and priests in the temple are Shivalli Madhva Brahmins.

itinerary.title: Day 3 — Srimanthi Bhai Memorial Government Museum & around

items.note: Srimanthi Bhai Memorial Government Museum Mangalore, Karnataka, Collection of archaeological and geological artefacts, a unit of Directorate of Archaeology & Museums Karnataka was founded on 4 May 1960 by Sri B.D Jatti, the chief minister of Karnataka Government. The museum is located in Mangalore, the coastal land of Karnataka.
Kadri is a city in Karnataka, India. As of 2020 the Bhandary Vertica, a 56-storey building that would be one of the tallest buildings in South India, was under construction there.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit St. Paul's Church, Mangalore?
faq.a: The best time to visit St. Paul's Church, Mangalore is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach St. Paul's Church, Mangalore?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Mangaluru International Airport (6 km) and the nearest railway station is Mangaluru Central (6 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for St. Paul's Church, Mangalore?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of St. Paul's Church, Mangalore at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in St. Paul's Church, Mangalore?
faq.a: Stays in St. Paul's Church, Mangalore start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in St. Paul's Church, Mangalore?
faq.a: The top attractions are Sri Mahalingeshwara Temple, Kavoor, Kavoor, Mangalore, Bondel, Kadri Park, Mudushedde.
